products.name: Palit RTX5060Ti DUAL 8GB
products.description: NVIDIA Blackwell architecture GPU with 8GB GDDR7 memory, dual-fan cooling design, DLSS 4 support, and hardware ray tracing. A solid choice for 1440p gaming on a budget.

products.name: Palit RTX 5060 Ti White OC
products.description: White-themed RTX 5060 Ti with factory overclock, 8GB GDDR7, and dual-fan cooler. Combines Blackwell ray tracing and DLSS 4 with clean aesthetics for white builds.

products.name: Palit RTX5070Ti GamingPro-S
products.description: High-performance RTX 5070 Ti with 12GB GDDR7 and triple-fan GamingPro-S cooler. Built for 4K gaming with full DLSS 4 and advanced ray tracing capabilities.

products.name: Palit RTX5080 GamingPro OC 16GB
products.description: Flagship RTX 5080 with 16GB GDDR7, factory OC, and triple-fan GamingPro cooler. Delivers top-tier 4K performance with Blackwell architecture and DLSS 4 Multi Frame Generation.

products.name: Sapphire PULSE AMD Radeon RX 9070 XT 16GB
products.description: AMD RDNA 4 graphics card with 16GB GDDR6 memory and Sapphire PULSE dual-fan cooling. Excellent rasterization performance for 1440p and 4K gaming with FSR 4 support.

products.name: Lian Li O11 Dynamic EVO XL Black
products.description: Full-tower E-ATX case with dual-chamber layout, reversible motherboard tray, and up to 420mm radiator support. Four tempered glass panels with tool-free access throughout.

products.name: Lian Li O11 Dynamic EVO XL White
products.description: White full-tower E-ATX case featuring dual-chamber design, reversible chassis layout, and support for up to 420mm radiators. Premium build quality with extensive tempered glass panels.

products.name: Lian Li Lancool III White
products.description: Mid-tower ATX case with high-airflow mesh front panel, modular interior, and support for up to 360mm radiators on top and front. Tool-free side panels with tempered glass.

products.name: Lian Li O11D Mini V2 Black
products.description: Compact mini-tower with dual-chamber design supporting mini-ITX to ATX motherboards. Fits up to 360mm radiators with tempered glass side panel and clean cable management.

products.name: Lian Li Lancool 216 Black
products.description: Mid-tower ATX case with mesh front panel, two pre-installed 160mm PWM fans, and GPU support bracket included. Supports up to 360mm top radiator with spacious interior.

products.name: Lian Li O11 Dynamic EVO RGB Black
products.description: Mid-tower ATX case with integrated RGB lighting strips, dual-chamber layout, and reversible motherboard tray. Supports up to 360mm radiators with tempered glass panels on multiple sides.

products.name: Lian Li LANCOOL 205M Mesh Black
products.description: Compact micro-ATX mesh case with high-airflow design, magnetic dust filters, and support for up to 280mm radiators. Budget-friendly with clean cable routing and tempered glass side panel.

products.name: Lian Li Galahad II Trinity Black
products.description: 360mm AIO liquid cooler with triple 120mm Trinity fans featuring daisy-chain connectivity. Low-noise pump design with full copper cold plate for Intel and AMD platforms.

products.name: Lian Li Galahad II Trinity SL-INF Black
products.description: 360mm AIO liquid cooler with Infinity Mirror fan design and SL-INF daisy-chain fans. Ultra-quiet pump with full copper cold plate, compatible with LGA1851, LGA1700, and AM5 sockets.

products.name: Lian Li Hydroshift LCD AIO Black
products.description: 360mm AIO with customizable 2.88-inch LCD display on the pump head for system monitoring or custom graphics. Premium build with low-noise operation and broad socket compatibility.

products.name: Arctic Liquid Freezer III Pro 360 A-RGB
products.description: 360mm AIO liquid cooler with A-RGB illuminated fans and optimized cold plate for maximum thermal transfer. Offset mounting for Intel and AMD, with industry-leading price-to-performance ratio.

products.name: Arctic Liquid Freezer III Pro 420 A-RGB
products.description: 420mm AIO liquid cooler with three 140mm A-RGB fans for maximum radiator surface area. Ideal for high-TDP processors, featuring offset mounting and near-silent operation under load.

products.name: Arctic P14 Pro A-RGB 3 Pack
products.description: Three-pack of 140mm PWM case fans with A-RGB lighting and fluid dynamic bearings. Optimized for high static pressure at low noise, rated for up to 200,000 hours of operation.

products.name: Arctic P12 Pro A-RGB
products.description: 120mm PWM case fan with A-RGB lighting and fluid dynamic bearing for near-silent operation. Delivers strong airflow at low RPM, ideal for case ventilation or radiator use.

products.name: Biostar H610MHC 2.0 mATX LGA1700 DDR4
products.description: Budget micro-ATX LGA1700 motherboard with Intel H610 chipset and DDR4 memory support. Features PCIe 4.0 x16 slot, M.2 storage, and Realtek Gigabit LAN for basic 12th/13th Gen Intel builds.

products.name: Biostar B760MXC PRO mATX LGA1700 DDR5
products.description: Micro-ATX LGA1700 board with Intel B760 chipset and DDR5 memory support. Offers PCIe 5.0 x16 slot, dual M.2 slots, and 2.5G LAN for mid-range 12th/13th/14th Gen Intel systems.

products.name: Maxsun iCraft Z890 Pacific DDR5 ATX
products.description: Premium ATX Z890 motherboard with DDR5 support, PCIe 5.0, and iCraft Pacific styling. Features robust VRM, Wi-Fi 7, multiple M.2 slots, and 2.5G LAN for Intel Arrow Lake overclocking.

products.name: Maxsun Terminator Z890-A WIFI DDR5 ATX
products.description: ATX Z890 motherboard with DDR5, Wi-Fi 6E, and Intel 2.5G LAN. Solid VRM design for Arrow Lake CPUs with PCIe 5.0 support, dual M.2 slots, and USB-C front panel header.

products.name: Maxsun Challenger Z890M DDR5 mATX
products.description: Compact micro-ATX Z890 board with DDR5 support and PCIe 5.0 for Intel Arrow Lake processors. Unlocked overclocking in a smaller form factor with dual M.2 and 2.5G networking.

products.name: Gigabyte Z890 UD WIFI6E DDR5 ATX
products.description: ATX Z890 motherboard with DDR5, Wi-Fi 6E, and Intel 2.5G LAN. Digital VRM design with PCIe 5.0 x16 slot, triple M.2 connectors, and USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C for Arrow Lake CPUs.

products.name: Gigabyte H810M K DDR5 mATX
products.description: Budget micro-ATX motherboard with Intel H810 chipset and DDR5 memory support. Entry-level LGA1851 board with PCIe 4.0, M.2 slot, and Gigabit LAN for cost-effective Arrow Lake builds.

products.name: Kingston Fury Beast Black 64GB 5600MHz CL36
products.description: 64GB (2x32GB) DDR5 desktop memory kit running at 5600MHz with CL36 latency. Low-profile black heat spreader with XMP 3.0 support, built with Kingston FURY performance-tuned ICs.

products.name: Lenovo L27QE 27" IPS 2K QHD 100Hz
products.description: 27-inch IPS monitor with 2560x1440 QHD resolution and 100Hz refresh rate. Wide color gamut with 99% sRGB coverage, HDMI and DisplayPort inputs, and ergonomic tilt-adjustable stand.

products.name: Lenovo ThinkVision S27-4E 27" FHD 100Hz
products.description: 27-inch FHD IPS business monitor with 100Hz refresh rate and ThinkVision reliability. Features AMD FreeSync, multiple input ports, and a fully adjustable ergonomic stand with cable management.

products.name: APC Back-UPS BX1600MI-GR 1600VA 900W
products.description: Line-interactive UPS with 1600VA/900W capacity and four Schuko CEE 7 outlets. Provides automatic voltage regulation, surge protection, and battery backup for PCs and networking equipment.

products.name: Intel Core Ultra 5 245KF Box LGA1851
products.description: Intel Arrow Lake desktop processor with 14 cores (6P+8E), up to 5.2GHz turbo, and LGA1851 socket. KF variant without integrated graphics, optimized for gaming and multi-threaded workloads.

products.name: TP-Link ARCHER MR200 AC750 4G Router
products.description: Dual-band AC750 wireless router with built-in 4G LTE modem and SIM card slot. Supports download speeds up to 150Mbps over LTE with four external antennas and four LAN ports.

products.name: Grandstream GWN7605LR Wi-Fi Access Point
products.description: Outdoor long-range Wi-Fi 5 access point with 2x2 MIMO, weatherproof IP66 housing, and PoE support. Covers up to 300 meters outdoors with centralized cloud management via GWN.Cloud.

products.name: Grandstream GWN7660E Wi-Fi 6 Access Point
products.description: Indoor Wi-Fi 6 access point with 2x2 MU-MIMO, 1.77Gbps aggregate throughput, and 802.3af PoE. Supports up to 256 concurrent clients with mesh networking and GWN.Cloud management.

products.name: Thermal Grizzly Kryonaut 11g
products.description: Premium 11g thermal compound with 12.5 W/mK conductivity, designed for high-performance CPU and GPU cooling. Non-electrically conductive and non-curing formula for safe, long-lasting application.

products.name: Thermal Grizzly Kryonaut 5.5g
products.description: High-performance 5.5g thermal paste rated at 12.5 W/mK thermal conductivity. Ideal for enthusiast CPU and GPU cooling with non-conductive, non-curing composition for easy reapplication.

products.name: Thermal Grizzly Hydronaut 8g
products.description: 8g thermal paste with 11.8 W/mK conductivity optimized for easy application and long-term stability. Slightly thicker viscosity than Kryonaut for simpler spreading on larger heatspreaders.

products.name: Arctic MX-7 8g
products.description: 8g high-performance thermal compound with excellent thermal conductivity and low thermal resistance. Metal-oxide-free formula safe for all CPU and GPU applications, with easy syringe applicator.

products.name: 1stPlayer Mousepad Z1 290x210mm Orange
products.description: Compact 290x210mm cloth mousepad with stitched edges and non-slip rubber base. Orange accent design with smooth micro-weave surface optimized for both optical and laser mice.

products.name: Arctic Screwdriver Set
products.description: Precision screwdriver toolkit designed for PC building and hardware maintenance. Includes magnetic tips in multiple sizes for motherboard standoffs, M.2 drives, and case screws.

products.name: Dell KB216 USB Keyboard Black
products.description: Standard USB wired keyboard with quiet keys, spill-resistant design, and multimedia shortcuts.

products.name: Patriot Viper V730 Mechanical Keyboard
products.description: Mechanical gaming keyboard with Kailh Brown switches, RGB backlighting, and anti-ghosting.

products.name: Patriot Viper V765 Mechanical RGB Keyboard
products.description: Premium mechanical gaming keyboard with per-key RGB lighting and Kailh Box switches.

products.name: Logitech MK220 Wireless Keyboard Mouse Combo
products.description: Compact wireless keyboard and mouse combo with 2.4GHz nano receiver and 24-month battery life.

products.name: Dell MS116 Wired USB Mouse Black
products.description: Simple USB wired optical mouse with 1000 DPI and ambidextrous design.

products.name: Patriot Viper V530 Optical Mouse 4000DPI
products.description: Gaming optical mouse with 4000 DPI sensor, 6 programmable buttons, and RGB lighting.

products.name: Razer DeathAdder V3 Mouse
products.description: Ultra-lightweight ergonomic gaming mouse with 30K DPI Focus Pro sensor and HyperSpeed wireless.

products.name: Razer Viper V2 Pro Wireless Mouse
products.description: Pro-grade wireless gaming mouse with 30K DPI Focus Pro sensor, 80-hour battery, under 58g.

products.name: 1stPlayer MP2 XL Mousepad Black
products.description: Extra-large cloth mousepad with stitched edges and non-slip rubber base.

products.name: Dell AW2725DF 27 QHD Gaming Monitor
products.description: 27-inch QHD gaming monitor with 360Hz refresh rate, NVIDIA G-SYNC, and fast IPS panel.

products.name: Dell P2423DE 23.8 QHD IPS Monitor
products.description: 23.8-inch QHD IPS monitor with USB-C connectivity and ergonomic stand.

products.name: AOC Q27G2E 27 2K QHD 155Hz Monitor
products.description: 27-inch 2K QHD gaming monitor with 155Hz refresh rate and AMD FreeSync.

products.name: Acer Nitro QG271M3 27 FHD 180Hz Monitor
products.description: 27-inch FHD gaming monitor with 180Hz refresh rate and AMD FreeSync Premium.

products.name: BenQ MOBIUZ EX240N 23.8 FHD Monitor
products.description: 23.8-inch FHD gaming monitor with 165Hz refresh rate and HDRi technology.

products.name: Dell Vostro 3520 i7-1255U 512GB 8GB
products.description: Business laptop with Intel Core i7-1255U, 512GB SSD, 8GB RAM, and 15.6-inch FHD display.

products.name: Dell Latitude 5440 i5-1335U 512GB 16GB
products.description: Enterprise-grade laptop with Intel Core i5-1335U, 512GB SSD, 16GB RAM, and 14-inch FHD display.

products.name: Dell XPS 9530 i9-13900H RTX 4070 32GB OLED
products.description: Premium 15.6-inch OLED laptop with i9-13900H, RTX 4070, 32GB RAM, and 3.5K OLED display.

products.name: Acer Predator Helios 300 i5-12500H RTX 3060
products.description: Gaming laptop with i5-12500H, RTX 3060 6GB, 15.6-inch 165Hz IPS display, and Predator cooling.

products.name: Razer BlackShark V2 Gaming Headset
products.description: Esports gaming headset with 50mm TriForce Titanium drivers and THX Spatial Audio.

products.name: Razer Kraken V3 X USB Gaming Headset
products.description: Lightweight USB gaming headset with 7.1 surround sound and 40mm TriForce drivers.
